name: HOTOSM Angola Points of Interest
description: OpenStreetMap points of interest for Angola, useful for attractions, amenities, tourism services, landmarks, restaurants, shops and public services.

name: Angola Administrative Boundaries COD-AB
description: Official common operational administrative boundary layers for Angola, useful for province and municipality mapping.

name: HOTOSM Angola Roads
description: OpenStreetMap road network for Angola, useful for accessibility and tourism route analysis.

name: Geofabrik Angola OpenStreetMap Extract
description: Full country OpenStreetMap extract for Angola for advanced GIS processing.

name: NASA POWER Climate Data
description: Daily climate variables such as temperature, rainfall, humidity, wind and solar radiation, useful for tourism climate comfort and resilience analysis.

name: World Bank Angola Indicators
description: World Development Indicators for Angola, including population, tourism arrivals, unemployment, forest area and electricity access.

name: FAOSTAT Angola Agriculture Data
description: Agriculture and food-system indicators useful for agrotourism opportunity mapping and rural value chains.

name: Protected Planet Angola Protected Areas
description: Protected areas and conservation zones in Angola, useful for ecotourism, biodiversity and sustainability prototypes.

name: Copernicus Global Dynamic Land Cover
description: Land-cover classes useful for environmental monitoring, rural/agrotourism opportunity mapping and land-use analysis.
